title: Ekrimania
description: A Minecraft mod adding additional TNT variants and items
body:
# Ekrimania
A Minecraft mod for adding additional TNT variants and items

Derived from the Greek '_ekrixi_', meaning explosion

## Adds...
- Compressed TNT, with the power of the 4 regular TNT blocks it's crafted from
- Shockwave TNT, dealing extra knockback at the cost of destruction power
- Firebomb TNT, creating a ring of fire within its explosion radius

## Coming soon...
- Additional TNT variants
- TNT tools, creating explosions with each use
- TNT armor, exploding on the wearers death, or in contact with fire/lava
- TNT arrows, exploding on impact
